categories.title: Technical SEO
categories.description: Foundation-level crawlability, speed, mobile optimization, and Core Web Vitals fixes that determine whether search engines can access and rank Vorionmart properly.

items.title: Generate dynamic XML sitemap with all product and category URLs
items.description: Verify the Next.js sitemap.ts output includes every active product slug, category page, and static route. Validate the file at /sitemap.xml returns proper XML with lastmod dates and correct priorities.

items.title: Configure robots.txt to block admin, partner, and internal paths
items.description: Ensure robots.ts disallows /admin/, /partner/, /login/, /signup/, /profile/, /cart/, /checkout/ routes while allowing all public storefront, product, and category pages. Test with Google's robots.txt tester.

items.title: Implement canonical URLs on all product and category pages
items.description: Add <link rel='canonical'> via Next.js metadata on every PDP and category page. Ensure filtered/sorted/paginated URLs point back to their canonical parent. Prevent duplicate content from query parameters like ?sort= or ?page=.

items.title: Enforce HTTPS across all pages and mixed content audit
items.description: Run full-site crawl to confirm every page loads over HTTPS. Check all image URLs, API endpoints, external scripts, and CDN assets for HTTP references. Fix any mixed content warnings in browser console.

items.title: Optimize Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) to under 2.5 seconds
items.description: Audit homepage and top 20 PDP pages. Implement next/image with priority loading for hero banners and product images. Add fetchpriority='high' on main product images. Preload critical fonts. Target LCP < 2.5s on 4G mobile.

items.title: Fix Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) on mobile product pages
items.description: Set explicit width/height on all product images, banner carousels, and ad slots. Ensure font loading doesn't cause layout shift by using font-display: swap with size-adjust fallbacks. Target CLS < 0.1.

items.title: Reduce First Input Delay (FID) / Interaction to Next Paint (INP)
items.description: Audit JavaScript bundle size with next/bundle-analyzer. Code-split heavy components. Defer non-critical scripts (analytics, chat widgets). Ensure INP < 200ms on mobile devices.

items.title: Implement mobile-first responsive design audit
items.description: Test every page template on 360px, 390px, 414px widths. Ensure touch targets are 48px minimum, text is readable without zoom, and no horizontal scrolling occurs. Verify viewport meta tag is set correctly.

items.title: Set up proper 301 redirects for changed URLs
items.description: Create redirect rules in next.config.js for any URL structure changes. Map old product URLs to new slugs. Ensure no redirect chains exist (max 1 hop). Set up monitoring for 404 spikes in Search Console.

items.title: Implement structured breadcrumb navigation with schema markup
items.description: Add breadcrumb UI and BreadcrumbList JSON-LD schema on all product and category pages. Format: Home > Category > Subcategory > Product Name. Ensure each breadcrumb item has a valid URL.

categories.title: On-Page SEO
categories.description: Title tags, meta descriptions, heading hierarchy, keyword placement, and internal linking optimizations for maximum SERP click-through rates.

items.title: Create keyword-rich title tag templates for all page types
items.description: Set template: Products → '{Product Name} - Buy Online at ₹{Price} | VorionMart'. Categories → '{Category} - Shop Online | Cash on Delivery | VorionMart'. Homepage → 'VorionMart - Premium Products | COD Available | Free Delivery'. Keep under 60 characters.

items.title: Write unique meta descriptions for top 50 product pages
items.description: Create compelling 150-160 character descriptions with: product name, key benefit, price indicator, and CTA. Include phrases like 'Cash on Delivery', 'Free Shipping', or '₹{price} only'. Avoid duplicate descriptions across products.

items.title: Enforce single H1 per page with target keyword
items.description: Audit all page templates to ensure exactly one H1 tag per page. Product pages: H1 = product name with primary keyword. Category pages: H1 = 'Buy {Category} Online'. Homepage: H1 = 'Premium Products with Cash on Delivery'.

items.title: Build proper H2/H3 heading hierarchy on product pages
items.description: Structure PDP headings: H1 (product name) → H2 (Product Description, Specifications, Reviews, Similar Products) → H3 (individual spec categories). Never skip heading levels. Each heading should include relevant secondary keywords.

items.title: Implement strategic internal linking from homepage to top categories
items.description: Add contextual links from homepage content blocks to top 10 category pages. Each category page should link to its top 5 products. Product pages should link to related products and parent category. Target 3-5 internal links per page.

items.title: Optimize URL slugs for all products and categories
items.description: Ensure URLs follow pattern: /products/{keyword-rich-slug} and /categories/{category-slug}. Remove special characters, numbers-only slugs, and auto-generated gibberish. Keep slugs under 5 words. Example: /products/wireless-earbuds-under-500

items.title: Add keyword-focused content blocks to category pages
items.description: Write 200-400 word content block for each category page above the product grid. Include: what the category offers, why buy from Vorionmart, available price ranges, COD availability. Target primary and LSI keywords naturally.

items.title: Place primary keyword in first 100 words of product descriptions
items.description: Rewrite the first paragraph of every product description to include the primary search keyword naturally. Example: 'This wireless Bluetooth earphone delivers crystal sound quality...' rather than 'Product details: SKU-12345'.

categories.title: Product SEO
categories.description: Product-level optimizations including structured data, image alt text, schema markup, and search-intent aligned product titles that directly drive purchase behavior.

items.title: Rewrite product titles for search intent alignment
items.description: Format: '{Brand} {Product Type} {Key Feature} - {Variant/Size/Color}'. Example: 'boAt Rockerz 255 Pro Wireless Neckband Earphone - Active Black'. Include the exact phrase Indian shoppers search for, not supplier-generated titles.

items.title: Write SEO-optimized product descriptions with buying keywords
items.description: Each product description must include: primary buying keyword, price value mention, COD availability, delivery timeline, key specifications, and comparison point. Minimum 150 words per product. Include phrases like 'buy online', 'best price', 'cash on delivery'.

items.title: Add descriptive alt text to all product images
items.description: Write alt text for every product image: '{Product Name} - {angle/view} | VorionMart'. Main image: full product name + primary keyword. Gallery images: product name + specific detail shown. Never leave alt text blank or use 'image1.jpg'.

items.title: Implement Product schema (JSON-LD) on all PDP pages
items.description: Add complete Product structured data: name, image, description, sku, brand, offers (price, priceCurrency: INR, availability, url), aggregateRating (only if real reviews exist). Validate each page with Google's Rich Results Test.

items.title: Add pricing and availability schema to product offers
items.description: Include Offer schema with: price, priceCurrency (INR), availability (InStock/OutOfStock), seller (Vorionmart), itemCondition (NewCondition), priceValidUntil, and shippingDetails. Update availability dynamically based on actual stock.

items.title: Implement Review schema for products with verified reviews
items.description: Add Review and AggregateRating schema only on products that have real customer reviews. Never fabricate review data. Include: reviewCount, ratingValue, bestRating (5), worstRating (1). Link to the review section on the PDP.

items.title: Optimize product image file sizes and formats
items.description: Convert all product images to WebP format via next/image. Set quality to 80. Implement lazy loading for below-fold gallery images. Ensure primary product image loads in < 200ms. Use responsive srcset for mobile/desktop.

items.title: Add FAQ schema to top 20 product pages
items.description: Create 3-5 FAQs per product covering: shipping time, COD availability, return policy, product specifications, and compatibility. Implement FAQPage JSON-LD schema. Use questions Indian shoppers actually ask (e.g., 'Is COD available?', 'What is delivery time?').

categories.title: Category SEO
categories.description: Category page optimization for high-volume head terms and aggregate product discovery through content, internal linking, and proper taxonomical structure.

items.title: Add SEO content blocks to every category page
items.description: Write 200-400 word descriptions for each category with: what products are available, price ranges, why shop at Vorionmart, COD/delivery info. Place above or below the product grid. Include primary category keyword 2-3 times naturally.

items.title: Create SEO-friendly category URL structure
items.description: Ensure all category URLs follow /categories/{keyword-slug} pattern. Example: /categories/wireless-earphones not /categories/cat-id-42. For subcategories: /categories/electronics/bluetooth-speakers. No ID-only or encoded URLs.

items.title: Target high-volume category keywords for each page
items.description: Map primary keyword to each category: Electronics → 'buy electronics online India', Fashion → 'trendy fashion online COD', Home & Kitchen → 'home essentials online delivery'. Add LSI keywords in content and headings.

items.title: Build internal linking from homepage to all category pages
items.description: Add visible category navigation links in: homepage hero section, category cards grid, footer navigation, and breadcrumbs. Each category should be reachable within 2 clicks from homepage. Use keyword-rich anchor text.

items.title: Add category-specific meta titles and descriptions
items.description: Each category page: Title = 'Buy {Category} Online at Best Price | COD Available | VorionMart'. Description = 'Shop {category} at VorionMart. {product count}+ products available. Cash on Delivery. Free Delivery on Every Order.'

items.title: Implement CollectionPage schema on category pages
items.description: Add CollectionPage or ItemList JSON-LD schema listing the products on each category page. Include: name, description, numberOfItems, and itemListElement array with product references.

categories.title: Content SEO
categories.description: Blog strategy, informational content, buying guides, and comparison posts designed to capture top-of-funnel traffic and guide users toward purchase decisions.

items.title: Set up blog section with SEO-optimized URL structure
items.description: Create /blog route in Next.js with URL pattern /blog/{keyword-rich-slug}. Implement Article schema on every blog post. Add pagination, category filters, and a search function. Ensure blog is linked from header navigation.

items.title: Write 5 buying guide articles for top-selling categories
items.description: Create comprehensive buying guides (1500+ words): 'How to Choose the Best Wireless Earphones Under ₹1000', 'Complete Guide to Buying Kitchen Appliances Online', etc. Include comparison tables, price ranges, and links to Vorionmart products.

items.title: Create 5 product comparison articles
items.description: Write detailed comparison posts: 'boAt vs Noise Earbuds: Which Should You Buy?', 'Top 5 Smartwatches Under ₹2000 in India', etc. Include specs tables, pros/cons, and 'Buy Now' CTAs linking to Vorionmart product pages.

items.title: Publish 5 informational articles targeting high-search keywords
items.description: Target informational queries: 'Is Cash on Delivery safe?', 'How to track your online order', 'Best online shopping tips India 2026'. Each article should naturally lead readers toward Vorionmart products and build topical authority.

items.title: Create internal linking strategy between blog and product pages
items.description: Every blog post must link to at least 3 relevant product pages with keyword-rich anchor text. Every category page should link to 1-2 relevant blog guides. Add 'Recommended Reads' section on product pages linking to guides.

categories.title: Keyword Strategy (India Focus)
categories.description: India-specific keyword research targeting Tier 2/3 city search behavior, price-based queries, COD-related searches, and regional buying intent patterns.

items.title: Research and map 50 short-tail head terms to pages
items.description: Identify 50 short-tail keywords (1-2 words) like 'earphones', 'smartwatch', 'kitchen appliance'. Map each to the most relevant category or product page. Document search volume and current ranking position.

items.title: Build long-tail keyword list of 100+ buying queries
items.description: Create spreadsheet of long-tail keywords (4+ words) Indian shoppers use: 'best wireless earphones under 500 COD', 'buy smartwatch online cash on delivery India', 'affordable home decor items online'. Group by category and intent.

items.title: Target price-based search queries across all categories
items.description: Create pages or product filters targeting: 'earphones under ₹500', 'smartwatch under ₹1000', 'gifts under ₹300'. Indian shoppers heavily use price-based searches. Add price range filters to category pages and optimize titles accordingly.

items.title: Target COD-specific search queries
items.description: Optimize for India-specific COD queries: 'buy {product} cash on delivery', '{product} COD available', 'COD shopping site India'. Add 'Cash on Delivery Available' prominently on pages. Create a dedicated COD landing page.

items.title: Research regional and Hinglish search terms
items.description: Identify regional search patterns: 'sasta earphone online' (cheap earphone), 'accha smartwatch' (good smartwatch), 'ghar ka saman online' (home items). Test incorporating Hinglish keywords in meta descriptions and FAQ sections.

items.title: Identify high-conversion keywords with low competition
items.description: Find 30+ keywords with: search volume > 500/month, keyword difficulty < 30, and clear buying intent. Focus on underserved niches like specific product models, brand alternatives, and local delivery queries.

items.title: Map WhatsApp trust signal keywords
items.description: Target queries like 'WhatsApp order online', 'order via WhatsApp India'. Add WhatsApp contact button prominently on product pages. Include WhatsApp number in structured data and homepage. Indian shoppers trust WhatsApp-verified stores.

categories.title: Indexing & Search Console
categories.description: Google Search Console setup, sitemap submission, URL inspection, indexing error resolution, and ongoing index health monitoring.

items.title: Complete Google Search Console setup and domain verification
items.description: Verify Vorionmart domain in Google Search Console via DNS TXT record. Add both www and non-www versions. Set preferred domain. Grant team access with appropriate permission levels.

items.title: Submit XML sitemap to Google Search Console
items.description: Submit /sitemap.xml URL in Search Console. Verify all submitted URLs are accepted. Monitor for coverage errors within 48 hours. Resubmit after any major URL structure changes or product catalog updates.

items.title: Run URL inspection on top 20 priority pages
items.description: Inspect homepage, top 10 category pages, and top 10 product pages via URL Inspection tool. Verify each is: crawled, indexed, mobile-friendly, and has no structured data errors. Request indexing for any non-indexed pages.

items.title: Fix all indexing errors and coverage issues
items.description: Review Index Coverage report. Fix: 'Crawled - not indexed', 'Discovered - not indexed', 'Excluded by noindex', '404 errors'. Prioritize fixing errors on product and category pages. Set up weekly monitoring.

items.title: Monitor Core Web Vitals in Search Console
items.description: Check Core Web Vitals report weekly. Set up alerts for any URLs falling into 'Poor' status. Prioritize fixing mobile CWV issues first as 80%+ of Vorionmart traffic will be mobile.

items.title: Set up Bing Webmaster Tools
items.description: Verify Vorionmart on Bing Webmaster Tools. Submit sitemap. Bing drives 3-5% of Indian search traffic and has near-zero competition. Quick win for additional organic traffic.

categories.title: Off-Page SEO
categories.description: Backlink acquisition strategy, local SEO for India, business directory listings, and social signal optimization for domain authority growth.

items.title: Create Google Business Profile for Vorionmart
items.description: Set up and verify Google Business Profile. Add: business name, category (Online Retailer), service areas (India), contact info, website URL, business hours, photos, and product highlights. Enable messaging.

items.title: List Vorionmart on 20 Indian business directories
items.description: Submit to: JustDial, Sulekha, IndiaMART, TradeIndia, Grotal, Yelp India, Yellow Pages India, ExportersIndia, Click.in, and 11 more relevant directories. Ensure NAP (Name, Address, Phone) consistency across all listings.

items.title: Build 10 quality backlinks from Indian tech/shopping blogs
items.description: Outreach to: ProductNation, Cashify blog, GadgetGig, Indian tech YouTube channels with blogs, and startup ecosystems. Offer product reviews, guest posts, or affiliate partnerships. Target DA 30+ sites only.

items.title: Create and optimize social media profiles for SEO
items.description: Set up Vorionmart profiles on: Instagram, Facebook Page, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Pinterest, and YouTube. Add website link, consistent branding, keyword-rich descriptions, and product showcases. Pin important posts.

items.title: Launch referral and user-generated content strategy
items.description: Encourage customers to share product photos on social media with #VorionMart. Create a WhatsApp community for customers. Collect and showcase real customer reviews and unboxing photos on the website.

items.title: Submit to startup listing sites
items.description: List on: StartupIndia, ProductHunt, BetaList, Crunchbase, F6S. Include Vorionmart story, founding details, and product highlights. These provide high-quality profile backlinks and brand visibility.

categories.title: Conversion SEO 🔥
categories.description: CTA optimization, trust signals, review displays, product page UX improvements, and page speed optimizations directly tied to purchase conversion rates.

items.title: Optimize Add to Cart CTA button visibility and copy
items.description: Ensure 'Add to Cart' and 'Buy Now' buttons are: above the fold on mobile, high contrast color (never grey), minimum 48px height, and always visible. Test button copy: 'Buy Now - COD Available' vs 'Add to Cart'. A/B test if possible.

items.title: Add trust signals adjacent to purchase CTAs
items.description: Display next to Add to Cart: '✓ Cash on Delivery Available', '✓ Free Delivery', '✓ Easy Returns', '✓ Secure Checkout'. Use icons + text. Show estimated delivery date. Add 'Trusted by X+ customers' if data exists.

items.title: Display customer reviews prominently on product pages
items.description: Show star rating and review count right below product title. Add a reviews section with verified badge, customer photos, and review date. Show 'No reviews yet - Be the first!' for products without reviews. Never show fake reviews.

items.title: Optimize product page load speed for 3G connections
items.description: Indian Tier 2/3 cities often have slow mobile internet. Target: page interactive in < 3s on 3G. Implement: lazy loading for images below fold, skeleton loading states, progressive image rendering, and API response caching.

items.title: Add sticky mobile Add to Cart bar on product pages
items.description: On mobile, implement a sticky bottom bar showing: product price, 'Add to Cart' button, and 'COD Available' badge. Bar should appear when the main CTA scrolls out of view. Keep it slim (56-64px) to not block content.

items.title: Show price savings and discount prominently
items.description: Display: MRP with strikethrough, selling price in larger bold font, 'You Save ₹X (X% OFF)' in green. For products over ₹500, show EMI option text. Indian shoppers are extremely price-sensitive and respond to visible savings.

items.title: Implement exit-intent popup with discount offer
items.description: On desktop: show a popup when cursor moves toward close/back. On mobile: show after 30s of inactivity. Offer: 'Get 10% off your first order!' with email capture. Use cookie to show only once per session.

items.title: Add WhatsApp order support button on PDP
items.description: Add a 'Order via WhatsApp' floating button on product pages. Pre-fill message with product name, price, and URL. Indian shoppers trust WhatsApp interactions and it reduces cart abandonment for uncertain buyers.

items.title: Optimize checkout flow for minimal friction
items.description: Reduce checkout to maximum 2 steps: Address → Confirm Order. Pre-fill returning customer data. Show order summary with product thumbnail. Display COD as the default/highlighted payment option. Show delivery estimate.

categories.title: Growth Tasks (Antigravity)
categories.description: High-impact, quick-execution SEO tasks designed for maximum organic growth with minimum effort. Trending product SEO and competitive gap exploitation.

items.title: Create landing pages for top 10 trending product searches
items.description: Research Google Trends India for currently trending products. Create optimized landing pages for: trending gadgets, viral social media products, seasonal items. Update monthly. These pages capture spike traffic before competitors.

items.title: Target 20 low-competition product keywords for quick ranking
items.description: Find product keywords with: <100 competition, >200 monthly searches, clear buying intent. Examples: specific model names, brand alternatives, niche accessories. Create dedicated product or category pages for each.

items.title: Implement price-comparison schema for competitive keywords
items.description: For products where Vorionmart has the best price, emphasize it in structured data and title tags. Use: 'Lowest Price Online' in titles if verifiable. Create comparison tables on blog showing Vorionmart vs competitors.

items.title: Build 'Best of' collection pages for SEO
items.description: Create curated pages: 'Best Earphones Under ₹500', 'Top Smart Home Gadgets 2026', 'Best Gifts Under ₹300'. These target high-volume informational queries and convert visitors to buyers. Update monthly.

items.title: Optimize for Google Shopping free listings
items.description: Ensure all products have: correct pricing in INR, availability status, product images meeting Google's requirements, and GTIN/MPN when available. Submit product feed to Google Merchant Center for free listing eligibility.

items.title: Launch seasonal SEO campaigns (festivals, sales events)
items.description: Create pre-made pages for: Diwali Sale, Republic Day Offers, Independence Day Deals, Rakhi Gifts, Back to School Sale. Publish 2 weeks before each event with targeted keywords. Reuse and update yearly.

items.title: Create city-specific landing pages for top 10 delivery cities
items.description: Build pages: 'Online Shopping in Lucknow with COD', 'Buy Electronics Online Jaipur', etc. Target Tier 2/3 city names + product terms. Include delivery timeline specific to each city.

items.title: Set up automated SEO health monitoring alerts
items.description: Configure weekly automated checks for: broken links (404s), dropped rankings, indexing errors, page speed regressions, and crawl budget waste. Use Search Console API or Screaming Frog automated crawls.

quickWins.task: Update robots.txt to block cart, checkout, login, and admin routes from crawling

quickWins.task: Create Google Business Profile with complete business info and product photos
